title: Traceability Model y extracción de entidades SDLC
wave: Ola 2 — Trazabilidad SDLC ejecutable y baseline industrial mínima cerrada

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-25 adds a dependency-free traceability model and read-only extractor. It introduces no external dependency, provider, runtime policy, persistent storage backend or destructive action.

pass_criteria: TraceEntity, TraceLink and TraceGraph are serializable to JSON.
Extractor detects FR, REQ, US, AC, TEST and ADR IDs.
Extractor detects duplicate IDs and malformed ID-like tokens.
traceability scan returns CommandResult and supports --json.
block_criteria: Extractor infers semantic links not explicitly present.
Targets outside the project root are accepted.
A new dependency is added without ADR.
risks: Heuristic extraction can report legitimate repeated references as duplicates.
Malformed ID-like tokens in filenames can be reported as warnings.
No traceability coverage or gap analysis is implemented until Sprint 26.
Trace links remain empty by design in Sprint 25.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-26 — Traceability Engine: validate, coverage y report
